title: Commercial Locksmith Services
shortDescription: High-security locks, electric strikes, SFIC, door closers, access control, master keys, and commercial lockouts.
longDescription: Commercial locksmith work should support how your building actually operates: who needs access, where key control matters, and which doors need reliable hardware every day.

Right of Entry handles practical commercial locksmith services including high-security commercial locks, electric strike installation, SFIC and interchangeable core systems, door closers, access control hardware, master key systems, and commercial lockouts.

title: Residential Locksmith Services
shortDescription: Home lock installation, smart locks, rekeying, and residential lockout help.
longDescription: Residential locksmith service is focused on keeping your home accessible to the right people and secure against everyone else. That can mean improving everyday convenience, replacing worn hardware, or getting you back inside during a lockout.
Common home services include lock installation, smart lock installation, rekeying after a move or lost key, deadbolt replacement, and residential lockout assistance.

title: Automotive Locksmith Services
shortDescription: Vehicle lockout help only, including emergency vehicle lockouts.
longDescription: Automotive service is currently limited to vehicle lockout assistance. Right of Entry does not currently advertise automotive key cutting, key programming, ignition repair, or fob replacement services.
If your keys are locked inside your vehicle, including during an emergency lockout situation, call for current availability and realistic arrival expectations.

title: Emergency Locksmith Services
shortDescription: Emergency residential, commercial, and automotive lockout services.
longDescription: Emergency locksmith calls are handled with a focus on clear communication, realistic arrival expectations, and non-destructive entry whenever possible.
Call for urgent residential lockouts, commercial lockouts, and automotive lockouts. Availability can vary, so the fastest next step is to call and describe the lockout situation.

title: Commercial Security
shortDescription: Master key systems, access control planning, and safe security support.
longDescription: Commercial work starts with how the building actually operates: who needs access, when they need it, and where key control or hardware upgrades will reduce risk without slowing down the business.
This category stays hidden from the public home page until the service package is finalized, but the structure is in place so pricing and scope can be published when it is ready.

title: Security Assessments
shortDescription: On-site reviews with practical recommendations for homes and businesses.
longDescription: A security assessment is meant to produce practical next steps, not a vague checklist. The review covers doors, hardware, weak points, and the changes that will make the biggest difference first.
This service is still staged as not publicly offered, but the content and pricing placeholders are ready so it can be turned on without another data-model change.
